mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_sales (date, product_id, product_name, category, sales_count, sales_amount, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{date}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{category}, #{salesCount}, #{salesAmount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product_sales SET date = #{date}, product_id = #{productId}, product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, sales_count = #{salesCount}, sales_amount = #{salesAmount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_sales WHERE date = #{date} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT * FROM product_sales WHERE date = #{date} ORDER BY sales_count DESC
SELECT * FROM product_sales ORDER BY date DESC, sales_count DESC
